title: pelargonium × saundersii
intro: Pelargonium × saundersii, also known as Saunders' geranium or Barberton geranium, is a plant species that belongs to the geranium family and is native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Pelargonium × saundersii include reducing inflammation, fighting off bacterial and viral infections, and soothing digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS). Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
